---
title: "Analysing Ecological Data with Detection Error"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
author: "Péter Sólymos"
toc: true
format:
  html: 
    html-math-method: katex
    self-contained: true
---

Sessions:

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
fl <- list.files(".")
for (f in fl) {
    l <- suppressWarnings(readLines(f))
    l1 <- trimws(l[grep("<h1 class=\"title\">", l)])
    l1 <- gsub("<h1 class=\"title\">", "", l1)
    l1 <- gsub("</h1>", "", l1)
    cat("- [", l1, "](./", f, ")\n", sep = "")
}
```
